sources.title: October. Gale. 2014. WEB DL( M)
sources.description: A doctor takes in a mysterious man who washes ashore at her remote cottage with a gunshot wound. Quickly they both learn the killer has arrived to finish the job, while a storm has cut them off from the mainland.

metadata.Plot: A doctor takes in a mysterious man who washes ashore at her remote cottage with a gunshot wound. Quickly they both learn the killer has arrived to finish the job, while a storm has cut them off from the mainland.
metadata.Actors: Patricia Clarkson, Scott Speedman, Tim Roth
